introSection: Galaxy was a steel sit-down roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC previously located at Parque Ítalo Americano in Caracas, Capital District, Venezuela. Following its closure in 2010, it was replaced by Python.
fullText: Galaxy was a steel sit-down roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC previously located at Parque Ítalo Americano in Caracas, Capital District, Venezuela. Following its closure in 2010, it was replaced by Python.
